title: citrus oblonga
intro: Citrus oblonga, also known as turmeric's relative, the bitter orange, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its essential oils, which contain limonene and other compounds that have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Citrus oblonga include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Citrus oblonga include teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
